title: senecio doria subsp. legionensis
intro: Senecio doria subsp. legionensis is a plant species within the Senecio genus, commonly known as ragwort, which is a flowering plant native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which have been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Senecio doria subsp. legionensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Senecio doria subsp. legionensis can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
